channel.title: Google-Play on Make Things Happen
channel.description: Recent content in Google-Play on Make Things Happen

item.title: How to download older version of Google Play Services?
item.description: In the new version of the Google Play Services library there is a lot of new code for the material design which really made my app huge and it crossed the border of 65 536 methods.

item.title: Google Play Account Ban – A nice reason to hate Google
item.description:
Edit: All of this happened in the long forgotten year - 2014

It is time for me to tell you a nice story. It is a long one so you can directly go to the middle of this article, which I expect to be long, so you can get the main point.
